app.name: EyesTalk
app.tagline: From a glance to a conversation

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.titleHint: Overview of what's happening at your venue right now
dashboard.activeUsersHint: People currently checked in at your venue
dashboard.totalCheckinsHint: Total number of check-ins since your venue was created
dashboard.activeActivitiesHint: Activities running right now — polls, games, challenges
dashboard.peakHoursHint: Times when your venue had the most visitors
dashboard.analyticsHint: Charts and trends for your venue's activity over time
dashboard.moderationHint: Review and resolve user reports and content issues
dashboard.activitiesHint: Create and manage polls, contests, quests, and challenges for your guests
dashboard.qrCodesHint: Generate and print QR codes to place around your venue for easy check-in
dashboard.settingsHint: Edit venue name, description, geofence, and more
dashboard.noVenue: You don't have a venue yet
dashboard.noVenueHint: Create your first venue to start seeing analytics and managing your space
dashboard.createFirst: Create your venue to get started
dashboard.liveScreenHint: Display real-time stats on a TV — perfect for the bar area
dashboard.reportsEmptyHint: All clear! Reports will appear here when users flag issues

auth.venueOwnerHint: Manage your venue, create activities, and view analytics

venues.createVenueHint: Fill in the details below to register your venue on EyesTalk
venues.name: Venue Name
venues.nameHint: The name guests will see on the map
venues.typeHint: This helps users find your venue by category
venues.addressHint: Street address — helps guests navigate to your venue
venues.descriptionHint: Tell guests what makes your venue special
venues.geofenceHint: How close a guest needs to be to check in — usually 50-200m
venues.coordsHint: Exact location on the map — use Google Maps to find coordinates
venues.locationOnMapHint: Search for a place or click on the map to set the exact venue location. The dashed circle shows the check-in geofence.
venues.coordsRequired: Please select a location on the map
